descs.desc:
Gain ([KnowledgeExplored] x 2% of Max HP) Shield if this Skill is Discarded
[WhenUse] [Discard] 1 Skill of the highest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots

Gain ([KnowledgeExplored] x 3% of Max HP) Shield if this Skill is Discarded
[WhenUse] [Discard] 1 Skill of the highest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots

Gain ([KnowledgeExplored] x 3% of Max HP) Shield if this Skill is Discarded
[WhenUse] [Discard] 1 Skill of the highest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots
[WhenUse] If target has 5+ [Sinking], Coin Power +1

Gain ([KnowledgeExplored] x 4% of Max HP) Shield if this Skill is Discarded
[WhenUse] [Discard] 1 Skill of the highest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots

Gain ([KnowledgeExplored] x 5% of Max HP) Shield if this Skill is Discarded
[WhenUse] [Discard] 1 Skill of the highest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn

Gain ([KnowledgeExplored] x 6% of Max HP) Shield if this Skill is Discarded
[WhenUse] [Discard] 1 Skill of the highest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots
[WhenUse] If target has 5+ [Sinking], Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn

Gain ([KnowledgeExplored] x 9% of Max HP) Shield if this Skill is Discarded
[WhenUse] Gain +8 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn

Gain ([KnowledgeExplored] x 12% of Max HP) Shield if this Skill is Discarded
[WhenUse] Gain +10 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn
[WhenUse] At 50%- HP, Coin Power +1

[WhenUse] Randomly [Discard] 2 of this unit's Skills in ascending order of ranks from all of its Skill Slots
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn

[WhenUse] Randomly [Discard] 2 of this unit's Skills in ascending order of ranks from all of its Skill Slots
[WhenUse] Gain +5 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn

1010801.name: Sinking Knowledge
1010801.desc: When attacked, inflict 1 [Sinking] to the attacker (4 times max)

1010811.name: Sinking Knowledge
1010811.desc: When attacked, inflict 1 [Sinking] on the attacker. When attacked while Shielded, inflict 1 additional [Sinking] on the attacker. (4 times max)

1010821.name: Reviewed Knowledge
1010821.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed Discards a Skill, gain (3 x Discarded Skill rank)% of the Max HP as Shield (Once per turn)

1010831.name: Reviewed Knowledge
1010831.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed Discards a Skill, gain (5 x Discarded Skill rank)% of the Max HP as Shield (2 times per turn)
